title: Bosmath #1315
definition:
Bashemath or Basmath = "spice"

 1) Hittite wife of Esau, daughter of Ishmael, sister of Nebaioth
 2) daughter of Solomon, wife of Ahimaaz, one of Solomon's commissariat
    officers
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bashemath or Basmath = "spice"

 1) Hittite wife of Esau, daughter of Ishmael, sister of Nebaioth
 2) daughter of Solomon, wife of Ahimaaz, one of Solomon's commissariat
    officers

    NASB:  perfume, a wife of Esau (or perh. two wives with the same name), also a daughter of Solomon
